items.title: Xbox’s ‘reset’: all the news about Microsoft’s looming layoffs and studio closures
items.summary: Xbox is making some big changes — again. On June 10th, a few months after Asha Sharma took over as CEO, she and newly-promoted chief content officer Matt Booty sent a memo to st...

items.title: Apple's Hide My Email may not be hiding anything
items.summary: A vulnerability can reportedly connect real email addresses to anonymous ones.

items.title: Goose, a New Gay Dating App, Appears to Be a Psyop
items.summary: Touted as a less-hookup-focused Grindr, Goose is an invite-only space for gay men. The problem is the people promoting it don’t seem real.
